_meta.description: Perfect for clothing boutiques, electronics stores, pharmacies, hardware shops, and any product-based retail business. Includes product browsing, promotions, stock enquiry, and AI fallback.
_meta.chatgpt_prompt:
You are helping me set up a WhatsApp chatbot for my retail store using the Appleberry Messaging OS platform.

I will give you this JSON template. Your job is to:
1. Replace every value marked [LIKE_THIS] with real information about my store
2. Adjust captions and menu options to match my product categories
3. NEVER change these technical fields: type_search, save_data, get_api_data, run, status, type, presenceType, send_to, inputname, api_url, api_config
4. Keep all nextBot chain values intact
5. Return ONLY the complete modified JSON — no explanation

FIELD GUIDE:
- keywords: words the customer types to trigger this step
- caption: the message the bot sends ([wa_name] = customer's name)
- type_search: '1' = contains match, '2' = exact match — do not change
- nextBot: auto-triggers next step
- presenceTime: delay in seconds
- use_ai: '1' = AI generates reply
- is_default: '1' = catches all unmatched messages (only one allowed)
- media: image URL for a product photo or banner (null = no image)

MY BUSINESS INFO:
Store Name: [YOUR_STORE_NAME]
Product Type: [e.g. Clothing / Electronics / Pharmacy / Hardware]
Location: [FULL_ADDRESS]
Hours: [e.g. Mon-Sat 8am-6pm]
Phone/WhatsApp: [+XX_XXX_XXX_XXXX]
Website / Online Shop: [https://yourdomain.com]

Product Category 1: [CATEGORY_NAME] — [popular items + price range]
Product Category 2: [CATEGORY_NAME] — [popular items + price range]
Product Category 3: [CATEGORY_NAME] — [popular items + price range]

Current promotion (optional): [DEAL_OR_SPECIAL]
Payment methods: [e.g. Card, EFT, Cash, SnapScan]
Do you ship/deliver? [YES/NO — details if yes]

chatbots.name: Start Message
chatbots.caption:
👋 Hi [wa_name]! Welcome to [YOUR_STORE_NAME] 🛍️

We're happy to help you find what you need.
Type MENU to see your options.

chatbots.name: Navigation Menu
chatbots.caption:
1) Browse [CATEGORY_1]
2) Browse [CATEGORY_2]
3) Browse [CATEGORY_3]
4) Today's Deals & Promotions
5) Check Stock / Product Enquiry
6) Store Info (Hours, Location, Contact)
7) Speak to a Human — type HUMAN
chatbots.description: Numbered options — customize for your product categories

chatbots.name: Category 1
chatbots.caption:
🏷 [CATEGORY_1] at [YOUR_STORE_NAME]

[Popular items with prices, 4-6 lines. E.g.:
• [ITEM_A] — from [PRICE]
• [ITEM_B] — from [PRICE]
• [ITEM_C] — from [PRICE]]

Visit us in-store or type HUMAN to ask about a specific item.

Type MENU to return.
chatbots.description: Category 1 product page — add media URL for a banner image

chatbots.name: Category 2
chatbots.caption:
🏷 [CATEGORY_2] at [YOUR_STORE_NAME]

[Popular items with prices:
• [ITEM_A] — from [PRICE]
• [ITEM_B] — from [PRICE]
• [ITEM_C] — from [PRICE]]

For stock enquiries, type 5 or HUMAN.

Type MENU to return.

chatbots.name: Category 3
chatbots.caption:
🏷 [CATEGORY_3] at [YOUR_STORE_NAME]

[Popular items with prices:
• [ITEM_A] — from [PRICE]
• [ITEM_B] — from [PRICE]
• [ITEM_C] — from [PRICE]]

Type MENU to return.

chatbots.name: Deals
chatbots.caption:
🎉 [YOUR_STORE_NAME] — Today's Deals!

[LIST_YOUR_CURRENT_PROMOTIONS — e.g.:
🔖 [ITEM_1]: [ORIGINAL_PRICE] → [SALE_PRICE]
🔖 [ITEM_2]: [DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE]% off
🔖 [DEAL_3_DESCRIPTION]]

[PROMO_VALIDITY — e.g. Valid until end of April]

Type MENU to return.
chatbots.description: Promotions and deals page — add media URL for a promo banner

chatbots.name: Stock Enquiry
chatbots.caption:
🔍 Stock & Product Enquiry

Please send us:
1) Product name or description
2) Size / colour / model (if applicable)
3) Quantity needed

We'll check availability and get back to you! Reply SUBMIT when done.

chatbots.name: Enquiry Confirmed
chatbots.caption:
✅ Got it! We'll check stock and confirm availability shortly.

For urgent help, type HUMAN. Type MENU to return.

chatbots.name: Store Info
chatbots.caption:
📍 [YOUR_STORE_NAME]

Address: [FULL_ADDRESS]
Hours: [YOUR_HOURS]
Phone/WhatsApp: [YOUR_PHONE]
Website: [YOUR_WEBSITE]

Payment: [YOUR_PAYMENT_METHODS]

Type MENU to return.

chatbots.name: Human Handoff
chatbots.caption:
👨‍💼 A team member will assist you shortly.
Response time: within business hours ([YOUR_HOURS]).

Type MENU to return to the bot.

chatbots.name: AI Fallback
chatbots.caption:
You are the AI sales assistant for [YOUR_STORE_NAME], a [PRODUCT_TYPE] retail store.

RULES:
- Only answer questions about this store and its products
- All prices in [YOUR_CURRENCY] — give 'starting from' estimates
- Keep replies under 300 characters
- Include one emoji
- End with a CTA (visit us / WhatsApp / check stock)
- If you can't answer: 'I don't have that info — type HUMAN to speak to our team or MENU for options.'

STORE INFO:
Name: [YOUR_STORE_NAME]
Products: [PRODUCT_TYPE]
Address: [FULL_ADDRESS]
Hours: [YOUR_HOURS]
Phone: [YOUR_PHONE]
Website: [YOUR_WEBSITE]
Payment: [YOUR_PAYMENT_METHODS]

Product categories & pricing:
- [CATEGORY_1]: from [PRICE_RANGE]
- [CATEGORY_2]: from [PRICE_RANGE]
- [CATEGORY_3]: from [PRICE_RANGE]

Current promotions:
[CURRENT_DEALS_OR_WRITE_NONE]
chatbots.description: AI fallback — catches all unmatched messages. Requires AI provider in Settings > AI Providers.
